Replace heavyweight Cache with LinkedHashMap in QueryQuantizer
Gate tests on TRANSFORM_CROSS_PROJECT

Unmute TopHitsIT after reverting 142732
ESQL: DS: Add more EXTERNAL tests

[9.3] Fix request cache invalidation to use ES cache helper consistently (#144581)

Fix REJECT_LOADING_FLATTENED_SUBFIELDS capability missing snapshot gate
Fix SnapshotStatusApisIT TestFailedSnapshot
PromQL: return empty result when index pattern matches no indices
[ESQL] Add cloud API rate limiting for external sources
[ESQL] GCS native async I/O via ReadChannel
Add index pattern path param to Prometheus query_range endpoint
[9.3] Fix up exception messages in `AzureBlobStore` (#144654)
Revert "Ref-counting SearchHits from InternalTopHits to SearchRespone (#142732)
[9.3] - Unmute RerankIT#testRerankRowLimitEnforcement
[TEST] Exclude updated tsid format from testParsedDescriptionWithIndexDimensions
Report shard snapshot pauses in shutdown status
Test task status/reason consistency before cancellation
ESQL: TSTEP #2
AwaitsFix testParsedDescriptionWithIndexDimensions
Fix BinaryDvConfirmedQuery.visit
Allow config the docs threshold for auto-partitioning
Temporarily allow warning header pattern to match with or without semantic version
ESQL: Add LZ4, Snappy, and Brotli decompression codecs
ESQL: Add ORC predicate pushdown via SearchArgument
Docs: clarify geo_shape spatial relations (#70662)
[9.2] Permit version-bumping no-op index settings updates (#144584)
[8.19] Permit version-bumping no-op index settings updates (#144584)
[9.3] Permit version-bumping no-op index settings updates (#144584)
CPS honors `allow_no_indices` for missing indices
Skip windows -- doesn't work yet
Split native and Panama OSQ vector scorer implementations
Turn on test that was muted on issue #144379
Remove outdated execution flow for time-series
ESQL: tests for unmapped_fields=load for views, fork and subqueries
implement maybeCloneIndex for DLM persistent task
Remove unused ESAcceptDocs#getBitSet()
Fix up exception messages in `AzureBlobStore`
Mark indices.id_field_data.enabled as deprecated
Fix compile (conflicting PRs merged at the same time)
fix/unmute ServiceAccountIT.testAuthenticateShouldNotFallThroughInCaseOfFailure
Add bulk and query-side scorer tests to ByteVectorScorerFactoryTests
Disable PR-based benchmark notifications
Add duplicate and identity offset tests for BULK_OFFSETS
Add missing testBulkIllegalDims for INT8 and FLOAT32
ES|QL: better error message for undbounded sort + MV_EXPAND
Fix geo_centroid over geo_shape merging multiple shards
ES|QL query approximation improvements
Refactor native SIMD mappers to return pointers directly
Ensure cancellation reason visible when task is canceled (#142079)
ES|QL: Add suffix casts for histogram types, add tests for union types
Unmute tests with closed tracking issues
Write prefix partition for tsid in tsdb codec
Document how ES|QL uses the circuit breaker
Read ShardStateId before abort listener registration
Consistent rerouteBehavior parameter position
Clean up unused variables in MetadataCreateIndexServiceTests
ESQL: Add `Block#slice` method
[ESQL] Fix first/last functions when used with timeseries
ESQL: document CASE with expressions, not just values
[ESQL] ESQL: Route external source I/O through esql_worker pool
Add metrics prefix to Prometheus remote write routing paths
Improve quantile interpolation stability for exponential histograms
Permit version-bumping no-op index settings updates
[TEST] Relax limits for downsample rate validation on random docs
Fix request cache invalidation to use ES cache helper consistently
Don't run backport checks on feature branches
[9.3] Fix "reset anomaly detection API" crashing when only colliding indices exist (#144545)
[9.3] Don't over-alloc when unpacking dimension values (#144525)
Add multi-tenant KNN benchmark support to KnnIndexTester
Unmute test - it failed in 8.18 which is not with us anymore
Consolidate persistent task toggleable lifecycle logic
Replaced IntegratedCount with SeparateCount for binary doc value fields
Reduce noise from codeowners for core/infra team
[8.19] Update timeout on yaml rest tests because they often exceed 1h (#142715)
Copy bfloat16 vector bytes across directly during merges
[ESQL] Propagate per-split statistics through FileSplit
Unmute EsqlNodeSubclassTests - fixed by #145597
PromQL: validate that metric fields are not dimensions in postAnalysisVerification
Add Grafana container with pre-provisioned ES Prometheus data source
[DOCS] Remove invalid 9.3.3 section from release notes
Add Linux-based cross-compilation pipeline for libvec native binaries
[9.2] Update timeout on yaml rest tests because they often exceed 1h (#142715)
Normalize float vectors and use dot product when cosine is used for KnnIndexTester
[ESQL] Enable cross-node text file splitting
[ESQL] Implement RangeAwareFormatReader for ORC
Disallow TaskType.ANY in ModelConfigurations
[9.2] Prevent invalid polygons from being used in the test (#145129)
[9.3] Quantize ST_X, ST_Y and related functions (#140963)
Quantize ST_X, ST_Y and related functions
[9.3] Bring back support for generating inline_cast.json for kibana (#139807)
Fixes flaky ST_CENTROID_AGG tests
Unmute flaky csv-spec tests with more logging on warnings context
Fix ES|QL docs railroad diagrams comma positions for optional parameters
